scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix api-gateway && npm install --prefix auth-service && npm install --prefix user-service && npm install --prefix course-service && npm install --prefix content-service && npm install --prefix quiz-service && npm install --prefix notification-service && npm install --prefix audit-service
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "GATEWAY,AUTH,USER,COURSE,CONTENT,QUIZ,NOTIF,AUDIT" -c "yellow,blue,green,magenta,cyan,red,white" "npm run dev --prefix api-gateway" "npm run dev --prefix auth-service" "npm run dev --prefix user-service" "npm run dev --prefix course-service" "npm run dev --prefix content-service" "npm run dev --prefix quiz-service" "npm run dev --prefix notification-service" "npm run dev --prefix audit-service"
scripts.start: npm run infra && npm run dev
scripts.db:reset: npm run db:init && npm run seed:demo
scripts.typecheck:all: npm run typecheck --prefix api-gateway && npm run typecheck --prefix auth-service && npm run typecheck --prefix user-service && npm run typecheck --prefix course-service && npm run typecheck --prefix content-service && npm run typecheck --prefix quiz-service && npm run typecheck --prefix notification-service && npm run typecheck --prefix audit-service && npm run typecheck --prefix web
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run typecheck:all
